title: Andy Mukherjee: How the AI shake-up of India’s tech sector has begun to hit its property market
description: Artificial intelligence (AI) is reshaping not just India’s software sector but also demand for brick-and-mortar property. IT layoffs have begun to act as a drag on a market that had boomed on the back of money being made—in Bengaluru, Hyderabad and Pune, notably.
